title: Visual Cortex
description: Visual Cortex is an integrated core module with all the essential functions required for modular video synthesis in the EuroRack format. Consolidating several previous LZX Industries modules, it provides a primary sync generator, video input and output (YPbPr component, S-Video, NTSC/PAL), video mixing and compositing, luma and chroma keying, 2D shape and animation generation, automated transition control, and a multi-function analogue RGB colourizer and compositor.
